description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring a mix of concrete and wood paneling on the exterior. The front includes a covered carport and large windows, while the rear showcases a spacious patio area with a swimming pool and pergola. The house has a prominent outdoor staircase leading to the upper level, and the landscaping includes patches of green lawn. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with a combination of large and small rectangular windows. The main entryway is sheltered by an overhang and supported by columns, providing a sleek and functional entrance. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, emphasizing clean lines and open outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, wood and concrete exterior, large windows, a carport, and a backyard pool with a pergola.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, main entryway with overhang, and a mix of wood and concrete facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outdoor staircase, upper terrace, and a glimpse of the backyard lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the swimming pool, pergola-covered patio, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the garage, pool, and integration of green lawn areas with the house structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, supported by columns, and a sheltered porch area.
